title: From aid to investment: Europe’s new development finance points to national development banks [Promoted Content]
summary_full: As traditional aid models weaken under geopolitical and fiscal pressure, Europe is reshaping development policy around investment, strategic partnerships and private capital mobilisation. National development banks such as BGK are emerging as critical actors linking EU geopolitical priorities with market-based financing and economic security.
